about.title: About Me
about.lead: I'm Manikanta Handral, a Master's student in Computer Science specializing in Big Data & Artificial Intelligence, based in Leipzig, Germany.
about.body: I bring hands-on experience across software engineering, AI systems, DevOps workflows, full-stack development, cloud technologies and machine learning applications. I'm passionate about building intelligent, scalable and impactful digital products — from clean, accessible interfaces to robust APIs and the data and models that power them.

education.title: Education
education.description: M.Sc. Computer Science (Big Data & Artificial Intelligence) at SRH University Leipzig, building on a B.Sc. in Computer Science.

careerGoals.title: Career Goals
careerGoals.description: To build AI-powered products that create real-world impact, while growing as an engineer who bridges research, data and scalable application development.

skills.subtitle: A snapshot of the languages, frameworks and tools I work with across AI, the web and data.

vital-guard.description: IoT-based wearable fall detection system using ESP8266, MPU6050, GPS and Blynk.

video-anomaly-detection.description: AI-powered surveillance anomaly detection using transfer learning and deep learning techniques.

sms-spam-detection.title: SMS Spam Detection System
sms-spam-detection.description: NLP-based machine learning system for classifying spam and legitimate messages.
